title: We love Ridgeview Primary
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Grade 1s at Ridgeview...
bodyText: [{"type":"blockquote","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Grade 1s at Ridgeview Primary School were all smiles on their first day of school this week."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was a rainy day and cooler than usual for January on Wednesday, 15 January.","html":"It was a rainy day and cooler than usual for January on Wednesday, 15 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Many of the children were wearing their waterproof windbreakers to protect them from the welcome drizzle which fell in dry Mossel Bay in the morning."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The children were given exercises to do to keep them busy and they got stuck into these activities with gusto.","html":"The children were given exercises to do to keep them busy and they got stuck into these activities with gusto."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
